content.text: Now I'll read the three main files:

I have successfully retrieved the complete content of all three requested files. Here is the summary:

## Files Found

### 1. Services Page
**Path:** `C:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy\easy-salon-monorepo\frontend\src\pages\salon\ServicesPage.tsx`

Complete file containing 560 lines. This is the services page for route `/salon/services`. Notable className attributes include:
- `salon-badge-active` and `salon-badge-inactive` for status badges
- `salon-input` for search input
- `text-right` for action column alignment
- `pr-1` for button padding
- Various Tailwind classes like `flex`, `items-center`, `gap-2`, etc.

### 2. Users Page
**Path:** `C:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy\easy-salon-monorepo\frontend\src\pages\salon\SalonUsersPage.tsx`

Complete file containing 405 lines. This is the users page for route `/salon/users`. Notable className attributes include:
- `salon-badge-active` and `salon-badge-inactive` for status badges
- `salon-input` for search and filter inputs
- `text-right` for action column alignment
- Responsive classes like `flex-col md:flex-row`, `w-full sm:max-w-sm`, etc.
- `text-orange-600 hover:text-orange-700` and `text-green-600 hover:text-green-700` for status toggle buttons
- `text-red-600 hover:text-red-700` for delete button
- `w-[95vw] max-w-[400px] rounded-xl md:rounded-lg` for responsive AlertDialog

### 3. Settings Page
**Path:** `C:\Users\charl\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\WA\Easy\easy-salon-monorepo\frontend\src\pages\salon\SettingsPage.tsx`

Complete file containing 191 lines. This is the settings page for route `/salon/settings`. Notable className attributes include:
- `grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6` for responsive grid layout
- `bg-card border border-border rounded-3xl p-5 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow` for settings card items
- `bg-secondary rounded-lg` for icon background
- `border border-destructive/20 rounded-lg bg-destructive/5` for danger zone section
- `w-[95vw] md:max-w-lg rounded-xl md:rounded-lg border-none shadow-2xl` for responsive AlertDialog
- `flex-col-reverse sm:flex-row gap-2` for footer layout

All files use consistent design patterns with responsive Tailwind CSS classes and proper component composition.
